backstory.original: The least ethical of the Oxventure crew, Prudence is a grumpy, power-hungry Tiefling Warlock. Cthulhu is Prudence's chosen warlock patron and stand-in father figure, and she does The Great Old One proud by waking up and choosing violence every single day. When she's not doing murders, Prudence enjoys a good book. Well, not a good book. An evil book. She has two in particular with her at all times in the monstrous forms of her beloved bitey book babies, Frisky and The Darkness. Prudence delights in anything creepy, gory and/or openly evil but has a soft spot for her fellow Oxventurers, who are the only folks this former hermit has any patience for. Either that or she hasn't found space in her busy murdering schedule to murder them yet.
backstory.display: 作为公牛冒险公会最缺德的成员，普鲁登斯是一位暴躁、渴望力量的提夫林邪术师。克苏鲁是普鲁登斯选择的邪术师守护者，也是她想象中的父亲替代者。她日行一恶，只为让这位旧日支配者感到骄傲。不杀人的时候，普鲁登斯也喜欢好书。好吧，也不算是好书。应该说是邪书。有两本怪物形态的书一直跟随在她的左右，它们分别是“嬉嬉”与“暗暗”。普鲁登斯喜欢一切诡异、血腥和明显邪恶的东西，她也喜欢公牛冒险公会的同伴们，他们是这位原来的隐士唯一能够忍耐得了的人。可能如此，也可能只是因为她还没在忙碌的杀人日程表上为他们腾出空间来。

description.original: A beam of crackling green shoots towards an enemy, dealing damage.
description.display: 向一名敌人发射一道绿色爆裂光束，造成伤害。

longDescription.original: A beam of crackling green shoots towards an enemy, dealing damage.
longDescription.display: 向一名敌人发射一道绿色爆裂光束，造成伤害。

description.original: Prudence opens a gateway to the dark between the stars, damaging and pulling enemies to it.
description.display: 普鲁登斯打开了一扇通往群星之暗的大门，对敌人造成伤害并将敌人拉向它。

longDescription.original: Prudence opens a gateway to the dark between the stars, a region infested with unknown horrors. An area of blackness and bitter cold appears on the ground slightly in front of the formation. Tentacles erupt out of it, pulling all enemies together.
longDescription.display: 普鲁登斯打开了一扇通往群星之暗的大门，这是一个充满未知恐怖的地区。阵型前方的地面上出现了一片漆黑而严寒的区域。触手从里面喷发出来，把所有的敌人聚集在一起。

description.desc: $(source_hero) gains one stack of glee each time she kills an enemy. For each stack of glee, her damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking additively. Glee has a 25% chance to lose one stack whenever a Champion other than $(source_hero) gets a kill.
$(source_hero)每击杀一名敌人，将获得 1 层“欢欣”堆叠。每拥有一层“欢欣”，她的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（加算）。每当除$(source_hero)以外的勇士造成击杀，“欢欣”有 25% 的几率减少 1 层。

tipText.original: Prudence delights in killing her enemies, each kill increases her damage (to a max).
tipText.display: 普鲁登斯因击杀敌人而感到愉悦，每次击杀都会提升她的伤害（至最高）。

description.desc: Increase the damage bonus of $(source_hero)'s Glee ability by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good aligned Champion in the formation, stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位善良阵营的勇士，使$(source_hero)的“欢欣”技能的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（加算后乘算）。

tipText.original: Good Champions in the formation further increase her damage bonus.
tipText.display: 阵型中善良阵营的勇士会进一步提升她的伤害加成。

description.desc: Increase the max stacks of $(source_hero)'s Glee by $(amount) for each Neutral or Evil Champion in the formation (additively).
阵型中每位中立或邪恶勇士均会使$(source_hero)的“欢欣”技能的最大堆叠层数提高 $(amount) 层（加算）。

effect_keys.total_title: 额外欢欣最大堆叠层数

description.desc: Every time $(source_hero) attacks an enemy but does not kill it she gains a stack of frustration. Frustration stacks increase her damage by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. The maximum number of Frustration stacks is equal to the number of Champions adjacent to $(source_hero). Frustration stacks are reduced by 1 each time $(source_hero) gets a kill.
每当$(source_hero)攻击敌人但未造成击杀，她将获得 1 层“沮丧”堆叠。“沮丧”堆叠会使她的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%（乘算）。“沮丧”堆叠的最大层数等同于与$(source_hero)相邻的勇士数量。$(source_hero)每取得一次击杀，“沮丧”减少 1 层。
When $(source_hero) attacks, there is a $(amount)% chance that her base attack cooldown will be immediately reset.
$(source_hero)攻击时，有 $(amount)% 几率立即重置基本攻击冷却时间。

specializationDescription.original: Prudence focuses on her Eldritch blast granting her a chance for multiple attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 普鲁登斯专注于她的魔能爆弹，使她有几率施展多重攻击。

description.desc: When $(source_hero) attacks, there is a $(amount)% chance that her ultimate attack cooldown will be immediately reset. $(source_hero) Ultimate Damage is increased by $(amount___2)%.
当$(source_hero)攻击时，有 $(amount)% 的几率立即重置她的杀招攻击冷却时间，并使$(source_hero)的杀招伤害提高 $(amount__2)%。

specializationDescription.original: Prudence focuses on her connection with Hadar, increasing the chance she can call them back.
specializationDescription.display: 普鲁登斯专注于与哈达的联系，提升她将其召回的几率。

name.display: 强化阵型 1 最大堆叠层数

description.original: What? They were in our way!
description.display: 什么？他们挡了我们的路！

description.original: Ask questions FIRST? What sort of outfit is this?
description.display: 先问问题？这是什么衣服？
尝尝这个！......你这个鬼东西！

character_sheet_details.backstory: The least ethical of the Oxventure crew, Prudence is a grumpy, power-hungry Tiefling Warlock. Cthulhu is Prudence's chosen warlock patron and stand-in father figure, and she does The Great Old One proud by waking up and choosing violence every single day. When she's not doing murders, Prudence enjoys a good book. Well, not a good book. An evil book. She has two in particular with her at all times in the monstrous forms of her beloved bitey book babies, Frisky and The Darkness. Prudence delights in anything creepy, gory and/or openly evil but has a soft spot for her fellow Oxventurers, who are the only folks this former hermit has any patience for. Either that or she hasn't found space in her busy murdering schedule to murder them yet.
